BASE.name: ATTACK_VECTOR
BASE.justification: The issue can be exploited remotely because dml in controller constructor enabling csrf.

BASE.name: ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
BASE.justification: No special conditions are required to exploit this issue.

BASE.name: PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
BASE.justification: No authentication required for execution; page visit is sufficient.

BASE.name: USER_INTERACTION
BASE.justification: A user must visit the page or open a malicious link.

BASE.name: SCOPE
BASE.justification: The attack stays within the same system boundaries (no sandbox escape).

BASE.name: INTEGRITY
BASE.justification: DML changes data in an unintended and unauthorized way.

BASE.name: AVAILABILITY
BASE.justification: No service outage or denial of service is expected.

TEMPORAL.name: EXPLOIT_CODE_MATURITY
TEMPORAL.justification: The issue is well known and demonstrable.

TEMPORAL.name: REPORT_CONFIDENCE
TEMPORAL.justification: The issue is clearly identified by static analysis.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: No authentication required for execution; page visit is sufficient.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_USER_INTERACTION
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: A user must visit the page or open a malicious link.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_INTEGRITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: DML changes data in an unintended and unauthorized way.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_AVAILABILITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: No service outage or denial of service is expected.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: INTEGRITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Business logic/data integrity is at stake.
